name: INVASION — Example Project
scriptContent:
INT. RESEARCH LABORATORY - NIGHT

A containment breach. The first contact goes wrong. HYBRID CREATURE HOLOGRAPHIC DISPLAY HOLOGRAPHIC DISPLAY
EXT. DESERT HIGHWAY - NIGHT

A lone driver witnesses the descent. SCOUT SAUCER SCOUT SAUCER ALIEN DRONE
EXT. FARMLAND - DAWN

The mothership eclipses the sunrise over the fields. BIOLUMINESCENT FLORA MOTHERSHIP MOTHERSHIP
INT. MILITARY COMMAND - CONTINUOUS

Generals scramble as the grid goes dark. ALIEN CONSOLE ALIEN CONSOLE HOLOGRAPHIC DISPLAY
EXT. DOWNTOWN PLAZA - DAY

First strike. The city learns what fear is. ALIEN SOLDIER DROPSHIP ENERGY SHIELD
INT. ALIEN MOTHERSHIP - BRIDGE

The Commander surveys the conquest. HOLOGRAPHIC DISPLAY HOLOGRAPHIC DISPLAY ALIEN HIVE INTERIOR
EXT. CITY ROOFTOPS - DAY

Survivors run as drones hunt the streets below. ALIEN DRONE ALIEN DRONE ALIEN DRONE
INT. SUBWAY TUNNEL - NIGHT

The resistance regroups underground. ALIEN SOLDIER WRECKAGE DEBRIS FIELD WRECKAGE DEBRIS FIELD
EXT. FOREST CLEARING - NIGHT

A downed scout craft. A chance to fight back. SCOUT SAUCER FOREST CLEARING SCOUT SAUCER
EXT. MILITARY AIRBASE - DAY

Humanity's counterattack takes off. MILITARY BASE MILITARY BASE MILITARY BASE
EXT. SKY OVER CITY - DAY

Dogfights between gunships and alien fighters. HUMAN GUNSHIP ALIEN FIGHTER HUMAN GUNSHIP
INT. ALIEN HIVE - CLIMAX

The final assault on the heart of the invasion. HYBRID CREATURE HYBRID CREATURE SWARM INSECTOID

taggedShots.text: Close on HYBRID CREATURE as energy crackles across its hull.
Wide establishing as HOLOGRAPHIC DISPLAY fills the frame.
Close on HOLOGRAPHIC DISPLAY as energy crackles across its hull.
ALIEN CONSOLE unleashes a volley of plasma fire.
Slow push-in on HOLOGRAPHIC DISPLAY silhouetted against the fire.
taggedShots.assumptions: HOLOGRAPHIC DISPLAY is full CG; plate shot clean for comp. Assumes final design locked.
taggedShots.methodology: Matchmove plate, animate hero, sim secondary FX, light & comp.
